prompt: What is the average exam score for each course?

inputData.question: What is the average exam score for each course?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average exam score for each course?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average exam score for each course?"},"startedAt":1771803288990,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"Computed per-course average of non-null exam_score by joining courses -> course_sections -> enrollments -> grades. Returned all courses (NULL for courses without any exam scores). Results ordered by course code for deterministic output.","sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;","assumptions":["exam_score is the numeric column representing the exam score to average","include all course sections and enrollments; courses with no exam scores should appear with NULL avg_exam_score"]},"endedAt":1771803320175},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;"},"startedAt":1771803320177,"status":"success","output":{"ok":true,"sql":"SELECT

FROM public.courses c

LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code resultRaw.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;

result.sql:
SELECT
  c.id AS course_id,
  c.code AS course_code,
  c.name AS course_name,
  ROUND(AVG(g.exam_score)::numeric, 2) AS avg_exam_score
FROM public.courses c
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id AND g.exam_score IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.id, c.code, c.name
ORDER BY c.code ASC;
